title: ASCII Video Player
description: Render a video as ASCII characters in the terminal or console.

snippets.label: Python
snippets.code:
import cv2
import os

# Simplified ASCII mapping
ASCII_CHARS = "@%#*+=-:. "

def frame_to_ascii(frame):
    # Resize and map pixels to ASCII chars
    pass

cap = cv2.VideoCapture('video.mp4')
while True:
    ret, frame = cap.read()
    if not ret: break
    print(frame_to_ascii(frame))
    os.system('cls' if os.name == 'nt' else 'clear')
